label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 13

extraction.one_line_summary: SENECHAL Florian won from Deceuninck lead-out after JAKOBSEN punctured near 3km line, out-throwing TRENTIN in sprint.
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck successfully recycled lead-out train after losing designated sprinter Jakobsen to late mechanical before 3km mark.
GC teams actively positioned through turns at 3.2km despite sprint stage, revealing continued paranoia about time loss.
KRIEGER Alexander's lead-out converted to personal sprint when MODOLO Sacha didn't hold wheel, exposing weak BikeExchange sprint cohesion.

rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: suffered puncture or mechanical issue inside final 3.2km approaching roundabouts, completely out of contention despite team control
rider_signals.SENECHAL Florian: positive: adapted from domestique to sprint finisher role mid-finale, beat TRENTIN on throw despite unplanned opportunity
rider_signals.KRIEGER Alexander: neutral: strong enough to contest sprint when Modolo disconnected, but BikeExchange lead-out coordination failed at critical moment
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: neutral: retained red jersey at 58s over Mas before mountain stages, but commentary hints team may prioritize Meintjes top-10
